data: {"generalSituation":"The trough of low pressure over Guangdong will affect the coastal areas gradually today. Meanwhile, under the influence of upper-air disturbances, there will be showers and thunderstorms over the region. A fresh to strong northeast monsoon will bring slightly cooler weather to the coast of Guangdong over the weekend. Under the influence of an anticyclone aloft, the weather will improve over the coast of Guangdong early next week. An active southwesterly airstream will bring unsettled weather to the coast of southern China in the middle and latter parts of next week. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Hagupit now in the vicinity of Guam will develop gradually in the next few days, and move in the general direction of the seas east of the Philippines.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260508","week":"Friday","forecastWind":"Light winds force 2, becoming northeast force 3 to 4 later.","forecastWeather":"Sunny intervals and a few showers. Hot during the day.
